title: A crowd observes a round yellow UFO for more than 5 hours in Caxambu-MG [1996]
excerpt: MAY 13th, 1996. Time: 16h00 pm. Duration: 5 hours and 30 minutes. text_preview: MAY 13th, 1996. Time: 16h00 pm. Duration: 5 hours and 30 minutes. In Caxambu, State of Minas Gerais, several people observed a UFO sighting for more than five hours, which was even reported on local TV. According to the witness who reported the sighting to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the unidentified flying object was round like a “luminous ball”, varied in size and it was yellow-orange in color. The object moved circularly with variable speeds at an altitude of approximately 3km and left a trail “in the shape of a 1/4 circumference”. Although the witness followed the event
summary: On 13 May 1996 in Caxambu MG a crowd watched a round yellow-orange luminous UFO move circularly at ~3 km altitude for over 5.5 hours; the event was covered on local TV.
